title: senecio hickenii
intro: Senecio hickenii, also known as Hicken's ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio hickenii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
